# WHAT: 01-opening

**Slide type:** hook
**Section:** Opening

## Top-level outcome
Audience feels the productivity problem in their gut before any slide introduces a solution.

## L1 (presentation-level)
Engineering time is being burned on work that doesn't compound.

## L2 (slide-level)
- A single provocative question that the audience immediately relates to
- No solution yet — tension only

## Verification criteria
- Title is assertive (not "Welcome")
- One focus element, not a bulleted list
- Audience can articulate the question after seeing the slide
